title: IT Infrastructure Engineer (Cloud/On-premise)
description:
About the Company Our client is a leading organization in the energy and utilities sector, trusted for delivering critical services with innovation, reliability, and sustainability. To support its digital transformation journey, the company is strengthening its IT infrastructure team.


Salary & Benefits: Approximate Total Annual Package: S$105,000 – S$119,000


Average Monthly Equivalent: S$8,750 – S$9,917

  • Basic Salary: S$6000 to S$7,000/month (negotiable based on experience)
  • Confirmed Annual Bonus: 1 month
  • Performance Bonus: 2–4 months
  • The salary is commensurate with qualifications and experience.

Office Location: North (Company Shuttle Bus: Provided across various areas for convenient commuting)


The Role


You will be responsible for the design, management, and optimization of hybrid IT infrastructure (cloud and on-premises). This is a technical role where you will provide both architectural guidance and hands-on management, ensuring that infrastructure is secure, resilient, cost-effective, and aligned with business objectives.


Responsibilities

  • Design and manage cloud and on-premises infrastructure, including production, DR, staging, and development environments.
  • Oversee compute, storage, networking, connectivity, monitoring, and security.
  • Lead operations such as patching, upgrades, data backup, DR, and lifecycle management of IT assets.
  • Deliver IT infrastructure projects, validating new IaaS/PaaS/SaaS solutions for fit, performance, and security.
  • Manage IT infrastructure budget, monitor expenditure, and drive cost optimization.
  • Collaborate with application, database, and cybersecurity teams to ensure systems meet policies and best practices.
  • Work with vendors and partners to achieve project and operational objectives.
  • Stay updated on emerging technologies and recommend improvements to the IT roadmap.

Key Requirements

  • Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent
  • Certified Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect and Microsoft Azure Administrator.
  • Experience in cloud solution architecting and On-Premise IT infrastructure management.
  • Strong technical understanding of compute, storage, networking, monitoring, DR, and cybersecurity.


How to Apply 👉 Click Apply now — or send your resume directly to Talent@BuildBridgePartners.com



EA Name: BuildBridge Partners Pte Ltd

EA License No: 25C2918

EA Reg No: R1551092

Khoo Yan Jie

postedCompany.description:
We help companies secure the right leaders to accelerate growth and navigate complex markets.

BuildBridge Partners is a boutique executive search firm specializing in senior leadership and technical expertise across Asia’s key growth sectors, including Property Real Estate, Data Centre, Built Environment and Technology,

Our approach is focused and senior-led — no junior handoffs, no volume-based sourcing, and no generalist methods.

Every search is managed with strategic precision, deep sector intelligence, and direct senior accountability.

We work with market-leading organizations that require specialized expertise and deliver leadership talent solutions aligned with their strategic goals — helping you build teams that perform.
postedCompany.name: BUILDBRIDGE PARTNERS PTE. LTD.
